# TextDecoration

**Object**

The object for defining color for text underline or strikethrough.

## Declaration

```swift
object TextDecoration
```

## Discussion

Use the `TextDecoration` object to define a stroke for strikethrough or underline.

You can use this object in [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/TextStyle] and [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/ComponentTextStyle].

### Example

```json
{
  "componentTextStyles": {
    "exampleStyle": {
      …
      "strikethrough": {
        "color": "#FFC800"
      },
      "underline": {
        "color": "#FFC800"
      }
    }
  }
}
```

## Text Effects

- **TextShadow**: The object for creating a text shadow.
- **TextShadowOffset**: The object for setting an offset value to use with a text shadow.
- **TextStrokeStyle**: The object for defining the stroke to use for an outline on text.
